caption: The video features a man playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red and black pendant. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The man seems focused and engaged as he performs, strumming the guitar and singing with a calm demeanor. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, adding to the live performance atmosphere.
